mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_generated_report WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND report_type = #{reportType} AND DATE(start_date) = DATE(#{date}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_generated_report(user_id, report_type, start_date, end_date, report_data_json, created_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{reportType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{reportDataJson}, #{createdAt})
